title: EFISH 5PCS Square Plastic Portion Box Sets with Lids.Food Storage Box,Container Sets,Food Storage,Food Containers,Cereal Containers,use for School,Work and Travel,950ML Per Box
features: 【Perfect Specifications】:Storage Box set consists of 5 transparent plastic with blue lids.Each size:( 6.7 x 6.7 x 2.75in, 1 Quarts,950ML),which can meet your different needs,from storing fruits to preparing dishes.
【Easy to carry】:Stackable,portable,reusable,and affordable way to prep healthy snacks for school,work,or on the go.

【Safety/Reusable/ Durable/ Stackable】:The container and the lid are made by BPA-Free and Food-Grade Safe PP materials.stackable in the freezer or lunch bag,easy to bring.Designed with kid-friendly lids that stay securely on.

【Micro-wave oven&Dishwasher safe】: Our plastic food containers with lidsare also made of anti-freeze and high-temperature materials.Freezers and microwave ovens can be used with confidence.Our products can be cleaned in the dishwasher,will not be deformed,and can be reused.
【WHAT YOU GET】:5PCS 950ML Containers Transparent Plastic Storage Boxes with Blue Lids.
description: Product Description DISHWASHER SAFE BPA-free containers designed to clean, convenient to use, and quick to organize. MICROWAVE CAN BE USED The lid needs to be opened to use the microwave safely FREEZER SAFE Can be placed in the refrigerator. EFISH 5 PCS Food containers, all with blue lids, will meet all your organisational needs. This means you can use them for work snacks, lunch boxes, catering, leftovers, gym, picnics and travel. Ldeal for holding various foods such as salads, pasta, healthy snacks, fruit, vegetables, nuts, curries, or even pet food and baby food. Please wash thoroughly before use.
